summary: Clean cycle — P0 CI blocker resolved, all site stat drift fixed or in-flight. PR #1390 (marketing EM) merged: og:description, JSON-LD, hero, kernel card, policy bullet, event kinds text (49→48), CLI heading (29→35). New PR #1393 filed this cycle: stat bar counters (event kinds 47→48, CLI 36→35) and feature card headings (21→24 Safety Invariants, 87→93 Destructive Patterns, 21→24 Built-in Invariants). All sprint blockers resolved. Site squad unblocked for first time in multiple cycles.

siteBuild.notes: Static site — no build required. site/index.html, posts.html, shellforge.html, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, og-image.png all present. ci-skip-site.yml workflow in place (#1296, merged) — site-only PRs now get required checks satisfied without running full lint/test suite.

verified: CLI commands: 35 top-level — 37 files in apps/cli/src/commands/ minus 2 subcommands (cloud-login.ts, policy-verify.ts)

structuralRisk.regressionPattern: Partial site syncs continue to miss one source of truth. PR #1390 (marketing EM) missed 5 locations — stat bar data-targets and card headings. Site has multiple layers: prose, metadata, stat bar counters, card headings, HTML comments. Any sync PR must scan all layers.
structuralRisk.recommendation: Add a site-stats-check script that greps site/index.html for all numeric claims and validates them against codebase sources. Run as a required check. This is the third EM cycle recommending this — should become a filed engineering issue for site-builder.

escalations: INFO: PR #1393 awaiting CI — should self-clear. No human action needed.
INFO: OWASP blog post at docs/blog/owasp-agentic-top10-agentguard.md still needs human to publish to LinkedIn (marketing squad escalation, not site).
MEDIUM: site-stats automation script not yet filed as engineering issue — recurring EM recommendation now 3 cycles old. Should be filed as feat(site) issue for site-builder.

dogfoodReport.status: clean — no governance issues this run. git checkout, git fetch, git merge, git add, git commit, git push, gh pr create, gh pr merge, gh pr view, gh issue view all executed without denial.

nextActions: Merge PR #1393 once CI passes (ci-skip-site.yml should satisfy all required checks)
